'''Cort Flavian''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who worked for the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] in the [[Security Police/Legends|Security Police]], though he was secretly an agent working for [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] to spy on the CSA. He served in the squad led by [[Jor Nieler]] stationed on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kirima (Kalinda system)|Kirima]] following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Den of Spies|book=Twin Stars of Kira (sourcebook)}} {{1st}}
